## What changed

Describe the user-facing behavior and why it changed.

## Privacy and security

- [ ] Vault scope, write behavior, networking, and stored data are unchanged, or the changes are explained below.
- [ ] Tests and examples use synthetic data only.
- [ ] No credentials, personal paths, real vault names, note contents, backups, or audit records are included.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check:all`
- [ ] Manual test with a disposable vault when user-facing installation or write behavior changed.
